128 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
Therefore, if the areas of two or more shapes are same then it is not
necessary that their perimeters are also equal.
discussion:
1.   The activity can also be extended to see if the perimeters of two or
more shapes are equal, then their areas are also equal or not?
2.   The same activity can be performed using different number of square
pieces.
3.   This activity can be used to make different packing boxes of the same
areas but with minimum perimeter and for tiling the floors and walls
in different designs.
